title: MedRabbits launches integrated clinic for consultations, diagnostics and treatment
summary: New facility combines home healthcare services with in-clinic care model
thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.
contentHtml:
New facility combines home healthcare services with in-clinic care model

MedRabbits has launched MedRabbits Clinic, a medical facility offering consultations, diagnostics and treatments under one roof. The clinic is part of the organisation’s integrated care model, combining home healthcare services with clinical infrastructure.

The launch marks a development in the organisation’s expansion, enabling transitions between home-based care and in-clinic services. The clinic includes consultations, diagnostics such as laboratory testing, ECG, TMT, X-ray, sonography and audiometry, along with pharmacy, eye and dental care services. The facility is supported by a team of over 25 healthcare professionals.

The integrated model is designed to enable diagnosis, treatment and continuity of care from consultation to follow-up.

Commenting on the launch, Suhasini Deshmukh said, “The opening of the MedRabbits Clinic represents an important step in our journey to make quality healthcare more accessible and integrated. Over the years, we have built strong relationships with families through our home healthcare services. With this clinic, we are extending that trust into a comprehensive clinical setting where patients can receive consultations, diagnostics, and treatment in a seamless and supportive environment. Our goal is to combine medical expertise with empathy, ensuring that every patient experiences not only clinical excellence but also reassurance and continuity of care.”

The clinic is designed to provide a healthcare setting for patients and healthcare professionals, bridging home-based care and institutional treatment. It enables patients to choose between care settings while accessing services.

MedRabbits provides home healthcare services across Indian cities, including nursing care, physiotherapy, diagnostics and medical equipment support. The launch of the clinic forms part of the organisation’s plan to build a healthcare model focused on continuity of care and patient services.
